segments.text: Make haste, O God, to deliver me! Make haste to help me, O Lord!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let them be ashamed and confounded Who seek my life; Let them be turned back and confused Who desire my hurt.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let them be turned back because of their shame, Who say, 'Aha, aha!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let all those who seek You rejoice and be glad in You; And let those who love Your salvation say continually, 'Let God be magnified!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I am poor and needy; Make haste to me, O God! You are my help and my deliverer; O Lord, do not delay.
segments.speaker: David
